sections.location: The smoke detectors are located in the hallways outside the bedrooms.
The circuit breaker is located on the wall in the living room.
The water shutoff is typically located at the end of the driveway near the curb.
The HVAC filter is located on the main floor near the thermostat.
The electric meter is typically located on the exterior of the home.
The thermostat is located on the wall to the left when you enter the home.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
